ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-26-2020 Continued To Nov-23-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Brian McCaffrey appeared by telephone for Kerry Boyd and Brian Boyd.

Mr. McCaffrey stated that he got the Client's signature, that he filed the petition on Thursday, that he titled it as an amended petition, that it got rejected and that he re-filed it on Friday. Status on close of estate is continued to November 23, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-28-2020 Continued To Oct-26-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian McCaffrey appeared by telephone for Brian Boyd, Kerry Boyd and Daniel Boyd.

Mr. McCaffrey stated that a petition for preliminary distribution is prepared, and that he got a signatures from his Client who is in Thailand and from his Client who is in Idaho, but his Client in San Francisco has been ill and did not sign the petition. Status on close of estate is continued to October 26, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-31-2020 Continued To Sep-28-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian McCaffrey appeared by telephone for Kerry Boyd and Brian Boyd.

Mr. McCaffrey stated that at the last appearance he explained that they are still trying to obtain the assets that are in Ireland. Mr. McCaffrey also stated that he has prepared a petition for preliminary distribution, that it is out for signature and that he needs three or four-weeks. Status on close of estate is continued to September 28, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Cabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jul-28-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian McCaffrey appeared by telephone for Brian Boyd, Kerry Boyd and Daniel Boyd.

Mr. McCaffrey spoke of the correspondence he has had with the Bank of Ireland, stated that every time he sends something back to the Bank of Ireland, the Bank asks for something else and that he sent the last document to the Bank over a month ago, but he has had no response. Mr. McCaffrey also requested a 45-day continuance stating that he will be filing a petition for preliminary distribution to get the funds to the trust. The Amended Second Report on Status of Administration is under submission. The order to appear is off calendar. Status on close of estate is set for August 31, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Dec-10-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-12-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for Brian Boyd and Daniel Boyd.

Mr. McCaffrey stated that they received information from T Rowe Price, but that the Bank of Ireland claimed they had not received their prior correspondence and that the bank has decided to question the validity of the will. Mr. McCaffrey also stated that they have forwarded the documents regarding the will, that they are waiting to hear back and that the Bank of Ireland has six thousand euros. The Court questions whether it should be a petition to approve a status report and await final distribution to a time when the matter is ready. The First and Final Account and Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is off calendar. Status on filing of a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for December 10, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-17-2019 Continued To Nov-12-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for Brian Boyd, Kerry Boyd and Daniel Boyd.

Mr. McCaffrey stated that his Clients are working diligently to provide the documents he needs, but they have not completely succeeded, that T. Rowe Price will not provide statements for the time prior to transferring to the estate account and that the Bank of Ireland has not yet transferred the euros to the estate. The First and Final Account and Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to November 12, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-30-2019 Continued To Sep-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for Kerry Boyd and Daniel Boyd.

Mr. McCaffrey requested a 60-day continuance stating that Kerry came in last week with quite a few records from Chase Bank, that they are having trouble with T Rowe Price and are renewing their request for records, and that they have located assets in Ireland, but do not know the amount until the assets get here. The First and Final Account and Report and Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is continued to September 17, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that an amendment to the petition for final distribution is filed.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for and with Brian Boyd and Kerry Boyd; for Daniel Boyd

The Court excused Mr. Daniel Boyd's appearance this morning at Mr. McCaffrey's request. Mr. McCaffrey stated that he met with Kerry Boyd last week, this is a complicated case, there is a related Trust, and the Decedent died away from home. Mr. McCaffrey also stated that they missed the last hearing because he didn't have it on his calendar. The Order to Appear is Off Calendar. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to July 2, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Filing of an Inventory & Appraisal, and a Petition for Final Distribution
